For at least 2 years, or 1 year in children and adolescents, numerous periods with hypomanic symptoms and depressive symptoms occur, neither meeting full criteria for hypomanic or major depressive episodes.

widgetData.source_sentence: I felt like my thoughts were disconnected and chaotic during a manic episode.

widgetData.source_sentence: I engage in risky behaviors like reckless driving or reckless sexual encounters.
sentences: Symptoms during a manic episode include inflated self-esteem or grandiosity,increased goal-directed activity, or excessive involvement in risky activities.
Marked decrease in functioning in areas like work, interpersonal relations, or self-care since the onset of the disturbance.
The agoraphobic situations are actively avoided, require the presence of a companion, or are endured with intense fear or anxiety.
